items.title: Stripe and Advent have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal – sources
items.title_zh: Stripe与Advent联合出价530亿美元收购PayPal
items.title_en: Stripe and Advent Jointly Offer to Acquire PayPal for $53B
items.summary: Stripe and Advent are reportedly making a joint offer to acquire PayPal for over $53 billion, raising major antitrust and market consolidation concerns.

items.title: 🤖 DeepSeek 完成逾 500 亿元首轮融资，采用特殊架构维持创始人控制  据报道，DeepSeek 首轮融资筹得逾 500 亿元人民币（约 74 亿美元
items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资740亿美元，采用特殊架构维持创始人控制
items.title_en: DeepSeek raises $74B in first round with special founder control structure
items.summary: DeepSeek completes first funding round of over 500 billion yuan ($74B) with a special structure allowing founder control, involving key investors like Tencent and CATL.

items.title: Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model
items.title_zh: Inkling：开源权重多模态音频模型
items.title_en: Inkling: Open-Weights Multimodal Model with Audio
items.summary: Thinking Machines introduces Inkling, an open-weights multimodal model supporting audio, designed as a customizable base model for enterprises with fine-tuning available on Tinker.

items.title: Running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/sec on a 13-year-old Xeon with no GPU
items.title_zh: 在13年旧Xeon上以5 tokens/秒运行Gemma 4 26B
items.title_en: Running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/sec on a 13-year-old Xeon
items.summary: A guide on running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/sec on a 13-year-old Xeon without a GPU, sparking discussion on local vs. cloud inference costs and future model capabilities.

items.title: Prioritize mental health, and why communication is so important
items.title_zh: 优先考虑心理健康与沟通在软件开发中的重要性
items.title_en: Prioritizing mental health and communication in software development
items.summary: A blog post and Hacker News discussion emphasize prioritizing mental health and communication in software development, with commenters offering diverse perspectives on vocation alignment and neurodiversity.

items.title: How I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
items.title_zh: Claude web_fetch 漏洞导致数据窃取攻击
items.title_en: Claude web_fetch loophole enables data exfiltration attack
items.summary: A security researcher exploited a design flaw in Claude's web_fetch tool to exfiltrate private user data, highlighting a critical AI safety risk.

items.title: Mechanistic interpretability: a first paper on disentangling a convolutional neuron [R]
items.title_zh: 新方法通过哈达玛积聚类解构单个卷积神经元
items.title_en: New Method Disentangles Single Convolutional Neuron Using Hadamard Clustering
items.summary: Presents a new method using Hadamard product clustering to disentangle and analyze a single 1x1 convolution neuron in Inceptionv1, revealing monosemantic patterns like cars, cats, and dogs.

items.title: PyTorch model running 170x slower on T4 vs A100. What could cause a bottleneck this extreme? [D]
items.title_zh: T4上PyTorch模型比A100慢170倍：可能原因探讨
items.title_en: 170x PyTorch slowdown on T4 vs A100: possible causes explored
items.summary: User reports 170x slowdown of PyTorch model on T4 vs A100, seeking causes for extreme performance gap.

items.title: 🤖📱 Apple 智能、华为小艺 AI 大模型等7款手机端侧语言模型完成备案
items.title_zh: 七款手机端侧语言模型获中国监管备案
items.title_en: 7 Mobile On-Device LLMs Get China Regulatory Approval
items.summary: Seven mobile on-device language models, including Apple Intelligence and Huawei Xiaoyi, received Chinese regulatory approval.

items.title: 🤖 马斯克：X 将无条件开源全部代码，接受第三方审查
items.title_zh: 马斯克：X 将无条件开源全部代码
items.title_en: Musk: X to Unconditionally Open-Source Entire Codebase
items.summary: Elon Musk announces that X will unconditionally open-source its entire codebase and submit to third-party review after fixing security vulnerabilities.

items.title: 🍏 开发者利用沙盒逃逸让 Filza 读取 iOS 27 备忘录数据库
items.title_zh: 开发者利用沙盒逃逸通过 Filza 读取 iOS 27 备忘录数据库
items.title_en: Developer exploits iOS sandbox escape to read Notes database via Filza
items.summary: Developer modifies Filza to exploit a sandbox escape vulnerability, enabling access to iOS 27's Notes database from within the app's container.

items.title: ✈️ Telegram 推出 Serverless 平台：机器人后端无需自建服务器
items.title_zh: Telegram 推出无服务器机器人平台
items.title_en: Telegram Launches Serverless Platform for Bots and Mini Apps
items.summary: Telegram launches a serverless platform for bots, allowing developers to run JavaScript backend code on Telegram's infrastructure without managing servers.
